description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Coverity that runs weekly on Thursdays at 18:00 UTC. Trigger on push to branch ghact with tags v*.*.*, ignoring README.md and CONTRIBUTING.md, and on pull requests to the master branch. Set up a windows-latest job with MinGW, install required libraries, download and cache Coverity scan tools, configure CMake, build with Coverity, and submit the results to Coverity.
